ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "isbn13" TEXT /* ISBN13 of the book */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code of the book */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Publication year of the book */,
  "publication_month" INTEGER /* Publication month of the book */,
  "publication_day" INTEGER /* Publication day of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book based on user ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the book (e.g., author, co-author, illustrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "spoiler_alert" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being recommended to */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting */,
  "other_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the other user being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., comment, like, follow) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_other_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
